headline: Sentiment down 60% this week, fears declining
key_insights: Optimism trending up 117% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 102 quotes despite falling from yesterday's peak - 67 strong-intensity quotes are still driving significant venting activity.

• At 33.5, frustration levels remain well above the typical range but dropped sharply from yesterday's 76.5.

• Optimism rebounded into positive territory after yesterday's low, while fears stayed quiet with moderate engagement.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
